Trigger.name: Enemy list capture
Trigger.script:
--With above regex trigger, the captured names are split up by the comma space and stored in a list --If you start working with other cities or people that call this order list different, add another line and set to perl regex
if matches[2] == gc.Leader then --Check if group lead called the order if matches[2] == gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.talker and string.find(gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.text, " "..matches[2]..".") and gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.channel == "party" then gc.target_list = string.split(matches[3], ", ")
--Set target to initial name, only if target is different from first name so it doesn't need to be called later if target ~= gc.target_list[1] then target = gc.target_list[1] raiseEvent("GC Target Changed") end
--Either auto enemies this captured list or sets that it still needs to be enemied if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then gc.autoEnemyList() else gc.ListEnemied = "No" end end end

regexCodeList.string: ^\(Party\): (\w+) says, \"Target order is: (.+)\.\"$

Trigger.name: Enemy list capture 2
Trigger.script:
--With above regex trigger, the captured names are split up by the comma space and stored in a list --If you start working with other cities or people that call this order list different, add another line and set to perl regex
if matches[2] == gc.Leader then --Check if group lead called the order if matches[2] == gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.talker and string.find(gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.text, " "..matches[2]..".") and gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.channel == "party" then gc.target_list = string.split(matches[5], ", ")
--Set target to initial name, only if target is different from first name so it doesn't need to be called later if target ~= gc.target_list[1] then target = gc.target_list[1] raiseEvent("GC Target Changed") end
--Either auto enemies this captured list or sets that it still needs to be enemied if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then gc.autoEnemyList() else gc.ListEnemied = "No" end end end

Trigger.name: Slain by detect
Trigger.script:
send("exits") --Capture most recently slain person gc.slain = matches[2] local slain = matches[2] --Added this extra var to work with since I was having trouble removing the first person to die during large death lists. Could be speed of generating the timers?
if table.contains(gc.SoulList, slain) then --Added this check incase some how they were already on the Soul list, this removes them to not double them table.remove(gc.SoulList, table.index_of(gc.SoulList, slain)) end
table.insert(gc.SoulList, slain)
gc.SoulTimers[tostring(slain)] = tempTimer(45, function() table.remove(gc.SoulList, table.index_of(gc.SoulList, slain)) killTimer(gc.SoulTimers[tostring(slain)]) end)
if target == gc.slain and gc.Settings.SetTarget then --Check if the person that died is your target and if you are switching targets!! if table.contains(gc.bursted, gc.slain) then --Check if just finished bursting and removes the block table.remove(gc.bursted, table.index_of(gc.bursted, gc.slain)) end boxAlert("Target Died!", "black", "LightSalmon:magenta", 8, 1)
tempTimer(0.5, [[gc.Burstcheck(tostring(gc.slain))]]) --The half second delay on calling the target switch function is to ensure capturing of burst
elseif target == gc.slain then --Inform of death if not swapping targets boxAlert("Target Died!", "black", "LightSalmon:magenta", 8, 1)
elseif table.contains(gc.target_list, gc.slain) then --Nice to know people on your target list but not currently your target are dying! boxAlert("Someone on Target list killed!", "yellow", "magenta", 40, 2) if gc.IsLeader == true then send(gc.report.." "..gc.slain.." killed!") else end
elseif gc.Leader == gc.slain then --gc.Leader is variable in the system. Add yours here (or don't) selectCurrentLine() setBold(true) bg("firebrick") fg("light_cyan") deselect() resetFormat() boxAlert("Leader is dead!", "magenta", "magenta", 10, 3) end

regexCodeList.string: ^You have slain (\w+)\.$
^(\w+) has been slain by \w+\.$
^Unable to withstand the arrow piercing \w+ chest, (\w+) stumbles to the ground, collapsing in a pool
^(\w+)\'s body disintegrates and a ghostly spirit rises from the ashes\. The ghost cries out in pain as a body forms around \w+ that has .*\.$

Trigger.name: Starbursted detect
Trigger.script:
--Makes a separte bursted table that can be cross refed --Also checks burst tracking for your target- notifies for target burst personally --Originally intended to stop removal of their name from target order- not doing that anyways now --Also, this table used to only track bursting of those on target list, but people get attacked that aren't originally on the list, better to track everyone
local burst = matches[2] table.insert(gc.bursted, burst)
--starts a timer for how long the name will be on the recently burested list to block autoremoval or target switching- unsure of the time, ?3 seconds? gc.BurstTimers[tostring(burst)] = tempTimer(3.5, function() table.remove(gc.bursted, table.index_of(gc.bursted, burst)) killTimer(gc.BurstTimers[tostring(burst)]) end)
--Strips them from the SoulList so they can stay targeted if table.contains(gc.SoulList, burst) then table.remove(gc.SoulList, table.index_of(gc.SoulList, burst)) end
--Attempts to inform if your target is still alive if target == matches[2] then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]: <cyan>---------------<black:OrangeRed>Target bursted<cyan:black>---------------") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]: <cyan>---------------<black:OrangeRed>Target bursted<cyan:black>---------------") end
if table.contains(gc.target_list, burst) then --Nice to know people on your target list but not currently your target are dying! cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]: <yellow>Someone on target list bursted!") if gc.IsLeader == true then send(gc.report.." "..burst.." bursted!") else end end

regexCodeList.string: ^A starburst tattoo flares and bathes (\w+) in red light\.$

Trigger.name: Name capture
Trigger.script:
setTriggerStayOpen("BW capture", 6)
local names = string.gsub(matches[2], ", and", ",")
names = string.split(names, ", ")
for n, v in pairs (names) do if not table.contains(gc.target_list, v) then table.insert(gc.target_list, v) --gc.autoEnemy(v) Removed both because it was too spammy-- --cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Added: <IndianRed>"..v) end end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> Added city to target order- <lemon_chiffon>zENEMY <SlateGrey>to enemy")

Trigger.name: Stop (Room gag)
Trigger.script:
--This closes everything up and runs the retargeting

gc.RoomTarget()

Trigger.name: Grace detection
Trigger.script:
--If who you try to hit is also your target this will inform you and try to avoid them in auto target swapping if matches[2] == target then if table.contains(gc.InRoom, target) then if not table.contains(gc.SoulList, target) then table.insert(gc.SoulList, target)
gc.SoulTimers[tostring(target)] = tempTimer(10, function() --Ignored for 10 seconds with auto targeting table.remove(gc.SoulList, table.index_of(gc.SoulList, target)) killTimer(gc.SoulTimers[tostring(target)]) end) end
if gc.Settings.SetTarget then boxAlert("Target Graced! SWITCH", "yellow", "white", 1, 1) gc.Burstcheck(tostring(target)) else boxAlert("Target Graced! SWITCH", "yellow", "white", 1, 1) end end end

Trigger.name: Close QW check
Trigger.script:
--On prompt this shuts things down, and kills all the temptrigger names with their ID's --Then it uses the list made with the temptriggers TempTargetList2 and compares to the one loaded --This comparison and addition into the target list is just to ensure the target order is preserved
setTriggerStayOpen("QW Target Check", 0)
for _, id in pairs(gc.NameCheck) do killTrigger(id) end
if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then --If system is handling enemies this unenemies to prepare for change send("unenemy all") end
gc.target_list = {} --Clear the target order to prepare for new order
for n, v in pairs (gc.TempTargetList) do --Ensures the list is ordered if table.contains(gc.TempTargetList2, v) then table.insert(gc.target_list, v) end end
if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then --checks if it should enemy the list gc.autoEnemyList() end
gc.TempTargetList = {} --Clear these lists for clean up and later use. gc.TempTargetList2 = {}
disableTrigger("QW Target Check") --Turn it all off to not keep going

Trigger.name: GC Target called
Trigger.script:
-- if target called is already targeted, no switching or calling happens. if matches[3] ~= target then
--Reflex to take the target that has been announced if matches[2] == gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.talker and string.find(gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.text, " "..matches[2]..".") and gmcp.Comm.Channel.Text.channel == "party" then
--if auto switching will switch and inform if gc.Settings.TargetSwitch == "auto" then --set party target variable gc.ToTarget = matches[3] -- only follow designated callers if table.contains(gc.Callers, matches[2]) then --if matches[2] == gc.Leader then --checks if target is in room and in target list if table.contains(gc.InRoom, matches[3]) and table.contains(gc.target_list, matches[3]) and not table.contains(gc.SoulList, matches[3]) then gc.ToTarget = matches[3] target = matches[3]
--sets serversive target. comment out if not needed --send("settarget "..target, false)
--if you have your own targeting alias or function, insert it below. native target alias is included in alias folders --targeting(target) expandAlias("t "..target)
boxAlert("Targeting: "..target, "red", "purple", 30, 5)
raiseEvent("GC Target Changed")
-- this will echo your target switch in party is 'zLoud' is active if gc.Settings.OverRide == true then send(gc.report.. " Target: "..target) else end
else boxAlert("Enemy not in room. Set your own target", "SpringGreen", "orange", 1, 1) end end
--if you want to execute the switch- tells you target was switched and stores it in ToTarget for swap elseif gc.Settings.TargetSwitch == "manual" then gc.ToTarget = matches[3]
boxAlert("Party Target is: "..gc.ToTarget, "white", "red", 30, 1)
else boxAlert("Enemy not in room. Set your own target", "SpringGreen", "orange", 1, 1) end end end

Trigger.name: Incandescence
Trigger.script: if matches.person == target then expandAlias("t clear") end send(gc.report.." "..matches[2].." has incandescence, dont hit!")

regexCodeList.string: As the gaze of (\w+) falls upon the perfect brilliance that (?<person>\w+) has become, there is a single, terrible moment when he stands transfixed. Then in a terrible flash his eyes rupture; steam pours from every pore as his blood turns to vapour, and finally he disintegrates into a cloud of ash that the implacable force that is (\w+) steps through.
^A burning column of fire descends upon (\w+), cloaking \w+ with its brilliance. The flames merge with those that already cloak \w+, and \w+ becomes little more than an incandescent pillar of light.$
A brilliant glow begins to emanate from within the raging inferno that is (\w+).

Trigger.name: Deliverance in Room
Trigger.script:
local person = multimatches[2][2]:trim()
if selectString(person, 1) > 0 then fg("red") setBold(true) deselect() resetFormat() end
cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <red>"..person.." <green>HAS <violet>DELIVERANCE") send(gc.report.." "..person.." has Deliverance! Do NOT target!") if person == target then expandAlias("t clear") end expandAlias("zremove "..matches[2])

([^\.]+) is here(?:\.|, sleeping soundly\.|, shrouded\.) \w+ is surrounded by a glowing white nimbus\.

Trigger.name: Lyred Down
Trigger.script:
cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <red>"..matches[2].." <gold>lyre DOWN") deleteLine() local who = matches[2] or target targetlyred = 0
if grounde and grounde.setLyred then grounde.setLyred(who, false) end
if ak and ak.scoreup then ak.scoreup(who) send(gc.report.." "..matches[2].." lyre is DOWN!") end

Trigger.name: Lyred Up
Trigger.script:
deleteLine() cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <red>"..matches[2].." <gold>lyre UP") local who = matches[2] or target targetlyred = 1
if grounde and grounde.setLyred then grounde.setLyred(who, true) end
if ak and ak.scoreup then ak.scoreup(who) send(gc.report.." "..matches[2].." has LYRE. Break or Switch Targets!") end

regexCodeList.string: ^([\w'\-]+) strums a few notes on .+\, and a prismatic barrier forms around \w+\.$
^Your attack is repelled by the prismatic barrier surrounding ([\w'\-]+)\.$
^(\w+) is surrounded by a sudden rush of feathers\, and a prismatic barrier forms around .*\.$
^([\w'\-]+) plucks at the strings on an elegant rosewood citole, and a bright, jovial tune accompanies the weaving of a prismatic barrier around \w+\.$

Trigger.name: Target Shielded
Trigger.script: deleteLine() cecho("\n<light_slate_blue>[GroundeCombat] <red>"..matches[2]..": <yellow>is SHIELDED") if matches[2] == target then send(gc.report.." "..matches[2].." is shielded!") end

regexCodeList.string: ^You are prevented from doing that by the magical shield around (\w+)\.$

Trigger.name: Olivebranch
Trigger.script: if matches[2] == target then send(gc.report.." "..target.." has olivebranch!") end

regexCodeList.string: ^The blow is robbed of all force as it enters the bubble of serenity surrounding (\w+)\.$
^(\w+) raises an olive branch into the air, a bubble of uttermost serenity surrounding .*\.$

Trigger.name: Prism
Trigger.script: send(gc.report.." Prism inbound!")

regexCodeList.string: ^A beam of prismatic light suddenly shoots into the room.$

Trigger.name: Exits gag
Trigger.script: deleteLine()

regexCodeList.string: You see
You see a single exit
You see exits

Alias.name: Group Combat on off
Alias.script:
if matches[2] == "on" then enableTrigger("Group Combat") --RelayAffs = true cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>On <SlateGrey>and ready!") cecho("

<snow>zHELPS for commands and zSTAT to see system status
") cecho("
<snow>zSETUP for target following walkthrough.

") cechoLink("<yellow>CLICK HERE FOR BASIC SETUP INSTRUCTIONS", [[expandAlias("zSETUP")]], "zSETUP for basic target following walkthrough.",true) cecho("

") gc.combatstatus()
elseif matches[2] == "off" then disableTrigger("Group Combat") --RelayAffs = false cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>Off <SlateGrey>and waiting!") end

Alias.name: Type of target changing
Alias.script:
--Whether you want the system to change targets or not
--Good to set to off if the party lead is alive and calling --Good to set to on if they're not around- KIA or MIA
if gc.Settings.SetTarget == false then gc.Settings.SetTarget = true cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>We <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> handle changing targets!") else gc.Settings.SetTarget = false cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>We <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> handle changing targets!") end

Alias.name: Party targeting
Alias.script:
--If its not, allows settings changes to how party target calls are handled if matches[2] == "p" then if gc.Settings.TargetSwitch == "auto" then gc.Settings.TargetSwitch = "manual" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Party targeting: <MistyRose>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch) elseif gc.Settings.TargetSwitch == "manual" then gc.Settings.TargetSwitch = "auto" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Party targeting: <SpringGreen>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch) else gc.Settings.TargetSwitch = "manual" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Party targeting: <MistyRose>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch) end
elseif matches[2] == "pauto" then gc.Settings.TargetSwitch = "auto" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Party targeting: <SpringGreen>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch)
elseif matches[2] == "pmanual" then gc.Settings.TargetSwitch = "manual" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Party targeting: <MistyRose>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch) end

Alias.name: Auto enemy toggle
Alias.script:
--Switch auto enemy with zauto
if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then gc.Settings.SetEnemy = "Nope" cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>We <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> auto-enemy!") else gc.Settings.SetEnemy = "Yep" cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>We <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> auto-enemy!") end

Alias.name: Toggle All Reporting
Alias.script:
local str = "pt" if isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report target movement!") str = str.." Reporting Target Movement," enableTrigger("Opponent movement") gc.Settings.MoveReporting = true
elseif isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report target movement!") str = str.." No Longer Reporting Target Movement," disableTrigger("Opponent movement") gc.Settings.MoveReporting = false
end
if isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") str = str.." Afflictions," enableTrigger("Aff Reporting") gc.Settings.AffCalling = true
elseif isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") str = str.." Afflictions," disableTrigger("Aff Reporting") gc.Settings.AffCalling = false
end
if isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report walls!") str = str.." Walls" enableTrigger("Wall Calls") gc.Settings.WallCalling = true
elseif isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report walls!") str = str.." Walls" disableTrigger("Wall Calls") gc.Settings.WallCalling = false
end
send(str)
-- if isActive("Opponent movement", "trigger") == 0 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report target movement!") -- send(gc.report.." Reporting Target Movement") -- enableTrigger("Opponent movement") -- gc.Settings.MoveReporting = true -- -- elseif isActive("Opponent movement", "trigger") == 1 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report target movement!") -- send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Target Movement") -- disableTrigger("Opponent movement") -- gc.Settings.MoveReporting = false -- -- end -- -- if isActive("Aff Reporting", "trigger") == 0 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") -- send(gc.report.." Reporting Afflictions") -- enableTrigger("Aff Reporting") -- gc.Settings.AffCalling = true -- -- elseif isActive("Aff Reporting", "trigger") == 1 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") -- send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Afflictions") -- disableTrigger("Aff Reporting") -- gc.Settings.AffCalling = false -- -- end -- -- if isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 0 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report walls!") -- send(gc.report.." Reporting Walls") -- enableTrigger("Wall Calls") -- gc.Settings.WallCalling = true -- -- elseif isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 1 then -- cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report walls!") -- send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Walls") -- disableTrigger("Wall Calls") -- gc.Settings.WallCalling = false -- -- end

Alias.name: Target movement reporting
Alias.script:
if isActive("Opponent movement", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report target movement!") send(gc.report.." Reporting Target Movement") enableTrigger("Opponent movement") gc.Settings.MoveReporting = true
elseif isActive("Opponent movement", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report target movement!") send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Target Movement") disableTrigger("Opponent movement") gc.Settings.MoveReporting = false
end

Alias.name: Target aff reporting
Alias.script:
if isActive("Aff Reporting", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") send(gc.report.." Reporting Afflictions") enableTrigger("Aff Reporting") gc.Settings.AffCalling = true
elseif isActive("Aff Reporting", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report afflictions to party!") send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Afflictions") disableTrigger("Aff Reporting") gc.Settings.AffCalling = false
end

Alias.name: Wall reporting
Alias.script:
if isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SpringGreen>WILL<SlateGrey> report walls!") send(gc.report.." Reporting Walls") enableTrigger("Wall Calls") gc.Settings.WallCalling = true
elseif isActive("Wall Calls", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WON'T<SlateGrey> report walls!") send(gc.report.." No Longer Reporting Walls") disableTrigger("Wall Calls") gc.Settings.WallCalling = false
end

Alias.name: In room city target setting
Alias.script:
if matches[2] == nil then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>"..gc.Settings.CityTargeting.."!") return end
local city = matches[2]:lower()
if city == "t" or city == "targ" or city == "targossas" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Targossas" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Targossas!") elseif city == "h" or city == "hash" or city == "hashan" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Hashan" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Hashan!") elseif city == "e" or city == "eles" or city == "eleusis" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Eleusis" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Eleusis!") elseif city == "c" or city == "cyr" or city == "cyrene" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Cyrene" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Cyrene!") elseif city == "a" or city == "ash" or city == "ashtan" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Ashtan" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Ashtan!") elseif city == "m" or city == "mhal" or city == "mhaldor" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "Mhaldor" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>Mhaldor!") elseif city == "none" or city == "reset" or city == "clear" then gc.Settings.CityTargeting = "" cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City capture set to: <IndianRed>none!") else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City not recognized") end

Alias.name: Call regardless of leading
Alias.script:
--Overrides allowing to call out target changes (and list order) as if you are the leader- good to have a few people with this on if gc.Leader ~= "Me" then if gc.IsLeader == false then gc.IsLeader = true gc.Settings.OverRide = true cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>WILL <lemon_chiffon> always call targets!") send(gc.report.." Now calling targets.") elseif gc.IsLeader == true then gc.IsLeader = false gc.Settings.OverRide = false cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>WON't always call targets!") send(gc.report.." No longer calling targets.") end elseif gc.Leader == "Me" then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <lemon_chiffon>YOU are the <SpringGreen>Leader<lemon_chiffon>, don't worry about this!") end

Alias.name: Party Chat Gag
Alias.script:
-- Gag the party chat to reduce spam. -- ONLY DO THIS IF YOUR CHAT IS PUSHED INTO A WINDOW
if isActive("Party Gag", "trigger") == 0 then gc.Settings.PartyGag = true enableTrigger("Party Gag") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Party Chat will be Gagged! Turn off if not pushed to a window!")
elseif isActive("Party Gag", "trigger") == 1 then gc.Settings.PartyGag = false disableTrigger("Party Gag") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>No longer gagging party chat!")
end

Alias.name: Channel Reporting Selection
Alias.script:
gc.report = matches[2]
if gc.report == "pt" or gc.report == "party" then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Now reporting to <cyan>Party") send(gc.report.." Reporting to this channel.")
elseif gc.report == "art" or gc.report == "army" then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Now reporting to <cyan>Army") send(gc.report.." Reporting to this channel.")
elseif gc.report == "gt" or gc.report == "group" then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Now reporting to <cyan>Group") send(gc.report.." Reporting to this channel.")
else cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey> Now reporting to <cyan>"..gc.report) send(gc.report.." Reporting to this channel.") end

Alias.name: Group leader set
Alias.script:
--Set the leader calling the target list and calling target changes
--If there was a different leader, removes them from table local removeOldLeader = table.index_of(gc.Callers, gc.Leader) table.remove(gc.Callers, removeOldLeader)
--sets new leader if matches[2]:title() == "Me" then gc.Leader = gmcp.Char.Status.name else gc.Leader = matches[2]:title() end
-- Set variable and add leader to gc.Callers if matches[2]:title() == "Me" then gc.IsLeader = true gc.Leader = gmcp.Char.Status.name if not table.contains(gc.Callers, gmcp.Char.Status.name:title()) then table.insert(gc.Callers, gmcp.Char.Status.name:title()) end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<red> Group leader changed to: <yellow>".. gc.Leader) else gc.IsLeader = false gc.Leader = matches[2]:title() if not table.contains(gc.Callers, gc.Leader) then table.insert(gc.Callers, gc.Leader) end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<red> Group leader changed to: <yellow>".. gc.Leader) end

Alias.name: Backup callers set
Alias.script:
--Set the backup callers for the target list and calling target changes
--set first caller gc.caller1 = matches[2]:title()
--set additional caller if needed if matches[3] then gc.caller2 = matches[3]:title() end
if matches[3] then if gc.caller1 == "Me" or gc.caller2 == "Me" then gc.Callers = {} cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> USE YOUR NAME AND TRY AGAIN! Callers Reset! zL <Leader>. zTC <caller1><caller2>")
elseif #gc.Callers >= 3 then gc.Callers = {} cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> More than 3 callers. Resetting. Set Leader and callers again. zL <Leader>. zTC <caller1><caller2>")
elseif table.contains(gc.Callers, gc.caller1) or table.contains(gc.Callers, gc.caller2) then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> Already following their targets! Check zSTAT!")
elseif gc.caller1 and gc.caller2 then table.insert(gc.Callers, gc.caller1) table.insert(gc.Callers, gc.caller2) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<red> Target callers added: <yellow>"..gc.caller1..", "..gc.caller2)
else table.insert(gc.Callers, gc.caller1) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<red> Target callers added: <yellow>"..gc.caller1) end
else if gc.caller1 == "Me" then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> USE YOUR NAME AND TRY AGAIN! Callers Reset! zL <Leader>. zTC <caller1><caller2>")
elseif #gc.Callers >= 3 then gc.Callers = {} cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> More than 3 callers. Resetting. Set Leader and callers again. zL <Leader>. zTC <caller1><caller2>")
elseif table.contains(gc.Callers, gc.caller1) then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<khaki> You are already following "..gc.caller1.." targets! Check zSTAT!")
else table.insert(gc.Callers, gc.caller1) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<red> Target callers added: <yellow>"..gc.caller1) end
end

Alias.name: Full help
Alias.script:
cecho("
<OrangeRed>---Party combat system commands: Full---
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<khaki> Basic Commands 
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zON,OFF<light_blue> -Raid system all on or off") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zS/zSTAT<light_blue> -Raid system info. Will display status of most toggles.") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zCHANNEL<Channel><light_blue> -Change the channel you report all targets and callouts to.") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zGAG<light_blue> -Toggle gagging the party chat (pt). ONLY USE IF CHAT IS IN A WINDOW") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zRESET<light_blue> -Empty target list") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zRE<light_blue> -Reset QL room gag without clearing target order")
cecho("

<light_blue>-<khaki> Target Following 
") cecho("<light_blue>-<grey> Always set a leader to follow targeting orders 
") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zL <name or 'Me'><light_blue> -Set leader") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zTC <name1> <name2><light_blue>-Set up to two backup or alternate target callers") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zA<light_blue> -Turn on auto target switching if your target dies!") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zP,zPAUTO/MANUAL<light_blue> -Will auto switch to party leader called targets")
cecho("

<light_blue>-<khaki> Targeting Commands 
") cecho("<light_blue>-<grey> Aliases to switch to targets in the target order. 
") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zN,zF,z#<light_blue> -Next, First, Position target") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zT <partial name><light_blue> -Target with only first few letters") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zR<light_blue> -Check the room for the highest ordered target and target them") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zT<light_blue> -Manual target last leader target call")
cecho("

<light_blue>-<khaki> Target Order Commands 
") cecho("<light_blue>-<grey> If a leader is set using zL alias, target order will populate if they call it to the party.
") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zADD name (#)<light_blue> -Add enemy to list at end or into a spot") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zMULTI name, name, name, ect<light_blue> -Add several enemies at once") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zREMOVE name<light_blue> -Remove enemy from list") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zSWAP <name> <#><light_blue> -Manual reordering person to a position") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zENEMY<light_blue> -Enemies the target list") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zAUTO<light_blue> -Enable setting enemies automatically") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zCITY<light_blue> -Change default city to add room targets from") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zBW <city letter><light_blue> -Add complete city to target order") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zAR (h|m|t|a|c|e|r|all)<light_blue> -Adds new people in room from that city to list")
cecho("

<light_blue>-<khaki> Leadership Commands 
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zORDER<light_blue> -List target order for reordering") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zCALL(F)<light_blue> -Call target order, F forces announce") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zC(F)<light_blue> -Call current target, F forces announce") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zGROUP <light_blue> -Report leaders, target, target list, callers, and more to party") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zLOUD<light_blue> -Make yourself call as if you were leader but not set to lead")
cecho("

<light_blue>-<khaki> Reporting Commands 
") cecho("<light_blue>-<grey> These are optional. If you are using channeled abilities, make sure these are off.
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zREPORT<light_blue> -Toggle reporting on/off for movement, affliction, and walls at once") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zMOVE<light_blue> -Toggle highlighting target movement") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zAFFS<light_blue> -Toggle reporting target afflictions") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zWALLS<light_blue> -Toggle reporting walls")
-- Old profile load/save aliases -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zLIST<light_blue> -Display saved lists to use") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zDELETE name<light_blue> -Delete a preset") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zSAVE name<light_blue> -Save target order for future") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zLOAD name<light_blue> -Load only those in realms into order") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zSET name<light_blue> -Replicate saved target order") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zSS<light_blue> -Force save settings") -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>zLS<light_blue> -Force load settings")

Alias.name: Status report short version
Alias.script:
gc.combatstatus()
-- This has all been converted into clickable links. zSTAT2 will give the non link version.
-- cecho("
<OrangeRed>---Party combat system status:") if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("<OrangeRed>(On)") elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("<IndianRed>(OFF!)")end -- -- -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Group leader: <cyan>"..gc.Leader) -- -- Specific target callers commented out. target switch is in room depedent now -- -- if gc.Caller ~= "" then -- --cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Target Caller <dodger_blue>" ..gc.Caller.."<snow>- ztc 'person'") -- --end -- --if gc.Caller2 ~= "" then -- --cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>2nd Caller <dodger_blue>" ..gc.Caller2.."<snow>-ztc 'person' 'person2'") -- --end -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Targeting: <dodger_blue>" ..target) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemy list: <light_blue>" ..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemied list: <MistyRose>" .. gc.ListEnemied) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Auto-enemy: <MistyRose>" .. gc.Settings.SetEnemy) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Call target: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.IsLeader):title()) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Re-Targeting: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.SetTarget):title()) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Moved report: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.MoveReporting):title()) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Aff reporting: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.AffCalling):title()) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Wall reporting:<MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.WallCalling):title()) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>City target: <MistyRose>" .. gc.Settings.CityTargeting) -- cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Party target: <SlateGrey>" .. gc.Settings.TargetSwitch)

Alias.name: Setup
Alias.script:
cecho("


<white>To follow target calls from a leader or designated caller. You will have to set up the following aliases:

") cecho("
<yellow>zL <me> or <person> <grey> - Set the party leader and who's target calls you will follow. If they call their target order to the party it will auto populate your target list.
") cecho("
<yellow>zTC <person> <person2><grey> - Add up to two backup target callers to follow.
") cecho("
<yellow>zA <grey> - Toggle auto vs manual target. Auto will switch targets whenever your current target dies.
") cecho("
<yellow>zP <grey> - Toggle to auto swap target when a leader/caller calls a new target.
") cecho("
<yellow>zEnemy <grey> - Toggle on auto enemying people who are added to the target list. Highly recommended.
")
cecho("


<yellow>zSTAT <grey> - Display current leaders, targets, and toggles.
") cecho("<yellow>zHELPS <grey> - Show ALL commands broken down by category.")

Alias.name: Status report with commands
Alias.script:
cecho("
<OrangeRed>---Party combat system status:") if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("<OrangeRed>(On)") elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("<IndianRed>(OFF!)")end cecho("<snow>-'zON/zOFF'")
cecho("

<orange> zSTAT will show status with clickable toggles 
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Group leader: <cyan>"..gc.Leader.." <snow>-'zL'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Target Callers:<cyan>"..table.concat(gc.Callers, ", ").." -<snow> zTC <caller1> <caller2>") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Targeting: <dodger_blue>" ..target) cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemy list: <light_blue>" ..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ").." <snow>- zEnemy") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>List cmds: <snow>-'zORDER' 'zAdd name (#)' 'zREMOVE name' 'zAR cityletter'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>List cmds2: <snow>-'zSWAP name #'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemied list: <MistyRose>" .. gc.ListEnemied.." <snow>-'zENEMY'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Auto-enemy: <MistyRose>" .. gc.Settings.SetEnemy.." <snow>-'zAUTO'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Call target: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.IsLeader):title().." <snow>-'zC(F)', 'zCALL(F)', 'zLOUD'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Re-Targeting: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.SetTarget):title().." <snow>-'zA' or 'zR to room scan'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Report to: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.report):upper().." <snow>- 'zChannel <channel>' to set reporting channel'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Moved report: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.MoveReporting):title().." <snow>-'zMOVE'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Aff reporting: <MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.AffCalling):title().." <snow>-'zAFFS'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Wall reporting:<MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.Settings.WallCalling):title().." <snow>-'zWALLS'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>City target: <MistyRose>" .. gc.Settings.CityTargeting.." <snow>- 'zCITY name' or letter") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Party target: <SlateGrey>" ..gc.Settings.TargetSwitch.." <snow>-'zT to target', 'zP to toggle setting'") cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>PT Gag: <SlateGrey>" ..gc.Settings.PartyGag.." <snow>-zGAG to toggle chat gag on/off")

Alias.name: targeting alias
Alias.script:
-- functioning but needs improvement. TO DO
var = matches[2]
function targeting(var) send("settarget "..var) target = var:lower():title()
--if you do not have AK. Comment this out or delete. ak.highlighttarget = ak.highlighttarget or true --Change This To False if Errors if ak.highlighttarget == true then if idtwo then killTrigger(idtwo) end idtwo = tempTrigger(target, [[selectString("]] .. target .. [[", 1) fg("red") resetFormat()]]) target = target:title() if id then killTrigger(id) end id = tempTrigger(target, [[selectString("]] .. target .. [[", 1) fg("red") resetFormat()]]) else end
if ak.stack and ak.stack == "none" then ak.classenable() end
--If you do not have Legacy. Comment this out or delete -- if Legacy.NDB.db[target] then -- local color = Legacy.Settings.NDB.Config[Legacy.NDB.db[target].city:lower()].color -- Legacy.NDB.lookup(target) -- sendAll("unally "..target, "enemy "..target) -- possibleClass = Legacy.NDB.db[target].class -- Legacy.bigEcho("Target set to: "..("<"..color..">" or "<white>")..target:title().." <DimGrey>(<gold>Level "..Legacy.NDB.db[target].level.." "..Legacy.NDB.db[target].class.."<DimGrey>)", "purple", "white") -- tempTimer(4, [[if Legacy.NDB.db[target].class ~= possibleClass then local color = Legacy.Settings.NDB.Config[Legacy.NDB.db[target].city:lower()].color -- Legacy.echo("Adjusted <"..color..">"..target.."'s <white>class to <gold>"..Legacy.NDB.db[target].class.."<white>.") end]]) -- end
-- This will always call your target to party -- if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then -- elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then -- send(gc.report.." Target: "..target) -- else end
echo("\n") cecho("<cyan> Target Changed to "..target) echo("\n") end
targeting(var)

Alias.name: Quick target change
Alias.script:
--Set of if statements to check what type of switch is wanted
if matches[2] == "n" then --Next in line to die local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, target) if position == nil then --Need this check incase your target was not on the list target = gc.target_list[1] expandAlias("t "..target) elseif position == #gc.target_list then target = gc.target_list[1] expandAlias("t "..target) else target = gc.target_list[position+1] expandAlias("t "..target) end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Next target: <IndianRed>" ..target)
elseif matches[2] == "f" then --Lets hit number one again target = gc.target_list[1] expandAlias("t "..target) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Next target: <IndianRed>" ..target)
elseif matches[2] == "t" then target = gc.ToTarget expandAlias("t "..target) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <black:white>-----Swapped to party target!-----")
else --Take your pick of who gets it! target = gc.target_list[tonumber(matches[2])] expandAlias("t "..target) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Next target: <IndianRed>" ..target) end --send("settarget "..target, false) --targeting(target)
gc.announcer("Single") raiseEvent("GC Target Changed")

Alias.name: Partial name targeting
Alias.script:
-- Uses target order and allows retargeting with first couple letters local person = matches[2]:lower():title() local found = false
if table.contains(gc.target_list, person) then -- exact match targets target = person gc.announcer("Single") raiseEvent("GC Target Changed") found = true cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon> Found/targeted <IndianRed>"..target)
elseif found == false then -- Search target list for a partial match for _, v in pairs(gc.target_list) do if string.starts(v, person) then target = v cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon> Found/targeted <IndianRed>"..target) gc.announcer("Single") raiseEvent("GC Target Changed") found = true break end end end expandAlias("t "..target)
--If no match, let you know it didn't find one if found == false then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon> Didn't match anyone.") end

Alias.name: Room targeting
Alias.script: --Use zr or zrt to check all in room and look at target list to target highest priority person enableTrigger("Stop (Room gag)") enableTrigger("Room gag") enableTrigger("Exits gag") tempTimer(0.5, [[disableTrigger("Exits gag")]]) send("ql") send("exits")

Alias.name: Target position swap
Alias.script:
local name = matches[2]:lower():title() local position = matches[3]
if table.contains(gc.target_list, name) and tonumber(position) < #gc.target_list then table.remove(gc.target_list, table.index_of(gc.target_list, name)) table.insert(gc.target_list, position, name) cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon> Moved: " ..name.. " to #"..position) end
if #gc.target_list < tonumber(position) then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon>Order isn’t that long.") end
if not table.contains(gc.target_list, name) then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <lemon_chiffon> Name not found in the order.") end

Alias.name: Add enemy
Alias.script:
--Alias to add enemies to the list, and will try to spellcheck with Name database
local new_enemy = matches[2]:lower():title() local position = matches[3] or #gc.target_list
--NDB check to use it check spelling of targets
if not ndb then if not table.contains(gc.target_list, new_enemy) then if position < #gc.target_list then table.insert(gc.target_list, position, new_enemy) else table.insert(gc.target_list, new_enemy) end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey>Target order is: <light_blue>"..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")) gc.autoEnemy(new_enemy) else cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey>Target is already in the order") end
--If NDB exists, checks for the persons name elseif ndb.isperson(new_enemy) then if not table.contains(gc.target_list, new_enemy) then if tonumber(position) < #gc.target_list then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <IndianRed>"..new_enemy.." <SlateGrey>sloted at- <cyan>"..position) table.insert(gc.target_list, position, new_enemy) else table.insert(gc.target_list, new_enemy) end cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Target order is: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", "))
--Attempt to enemy them or reminder gc.autoEnemy(new_enemy) else cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey>Target is already in the order") end
else --If NDB doesn't find them, reports. If they are for sure a person, honors them cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<light_blue> NDB doesn't recognize that name") end

Alias.name: Add multiple names
Alias.script:
--Takes multiple names in to add --Yes, I agree, this pattern is a little rediculous! Basically it forces entering names with or without comma and won't allow mixing! --Splits the name up by ,(space) or just spaces if those are used instead --Runs through the list checking if they are on the targetlist already to skip, and also attempted to enemy
local NameList = matches[2]
if NameList:find(",") then --This figures out the type of split to run NameList = string.split(NameList, ", ") else NameList = string.split(NameList, " ") end
for n, v in pairs (NameList) do --This sends the list into the target order and enemies them if its on if not table.contains(gc.target_list, v:title()) then table.insert(gc.target_list, v:title()) gc.autoEnemy(v:title()) end end
cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Added: <IndianRed>" ..table.concat(NameList, ", ")) --Informs the list was recognized

Alias.name: Remove enemy
Alias.script:
local new_enemy = matches[2]:title()
--Remove from the target list table.remove(gc.target_list, table.index_of(gc.target_list, new_enemy))
--Display current target list cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Target order is: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", "))
--attempt to unenemy them or reminder gc.autoUnenemy(new_enemy)

Alias.name: Enemy the list
Alias.script:
--Functions to set the target list to be your enemies
cecho("<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> Setting enemies to target list!") local x = 0 send("Unenemy all", false) --If you'd rather only unenemy when its a long list, comment out this and activate the if below, set the number --if #gc.target_list > 5 then send("Unenemy all", false) end local str = "" for _,v in pairs (gc.target_list) do --Run a loop over the target list to enemy everyone str = str.."Enemy "..v.."::" x = x + 1 if x == 19 then break end end send(str) send("enemies")
gc.ListEnemied = "Yep" --For status report- enemies have been set

Alias.name: Reorder enemies
Alias.script: gc.order_report()

Alias.name: In room add
Alias.script:
--Pretty straight forward- Takes the city letter or all and looks through the room for who's from their and not on the list and addes them. --Careful using all! Between this adding friendlies and autotarget switching- you'll start to hit friends eventually.
local city
if matches[2] == "all" then local NewNames = {} for _,v in pairs(gc.InRoom) do if not table.contains(gc.target_list, v) then table.insert(gc.target_list, v) table.insert(NewNames, v) end end if #NewNames > 0 then cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>-Careful! Adding the whole room! Added Targets: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(NewNames, ", ")) else cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>-No new targets found-") end return end
if not ndb then --If you set up your own Name data base in the below script delete this check. cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon>====No Name Database--Need to set this up to work====") return end
if matches[2] == nil then if gc.Settings.CityTargeting == "none" then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> No city set") return else local NewNames = {} city = gc.Settings.CityTargeting for _,v in pairs(gc.InRoom) do if not table.contains(gc.target_list, v) then if ndb.getcity(v) == city then table.insert(gc.target_list, v) table.insert(NewNames, v) end end end if #NewNames > 0 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Added these "..city.." Targets: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(NewNames, ", "))
if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then for _,v in pairs (NewNames) do --Enemy the new people if you have auto enemy going. send("Enemy "..v,false) end end else cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>-No new targets found from "..city.."-") end return end end
if matches[2] == "h" then city = "Hashan" elseif matches[2] == "m" then city = "Mhaldor" elseif matches[2] == "t" then city = "Targossas" elseif matches[2] == "a" then city = "Ashtan" elseif matches[2] == "c" then city = "Cyrene" elseif matches[2] == "e" then city = "Eleusis" elseif matches[2] == "r" then city = "Rogue" end
local NewNames = {} for _,v in pairs(gc.InRoom) do if not table.contains(gc.target_list, v) then if ndb.getcity(v) == city then table.insert(gc.target_list, v) table.insert(NewNames, v) end end end
if #NewNames > 0 then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Added these "..city.." Targets: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(NewNames, ", ")) if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then for _,v in pairs (NewNames) do --Enemy the new people if you have auto enemy going. send("Enemy "..v,false) end end else cecho("

<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>-No new targets found from "..city.."-") end

Alias.name: City target adding
Alias.script:
--This takes a few different forms of a city name and uses bw to make a target order --Before sending the bw text it opens the trigger gate called BW capture
local city = matches[2]:lower()
if city == "t" or city == "targ" or city == "targossas" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <SpringGreen>Targossas") send("bw targossas", false) elseif city == "h" or city == "hash" or city == "hashan" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <brown>Hashan") send("bw hashan", false) elseif city == "e" or city == "eles" or city == "eleusis" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <SpringGreen>Eleusis") send("bw Eleusis", false) elseif city == "c" or city == "cyr" or city == "cyrene" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <sky_blue>Cyrene") send("bw cyrene", false) elseif city == "a" or city == "ash" or city == "ashtan" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <orange>Ashtan") send("bw ashtan", false) elseif city == "m" or city == "mhal" or city == "mhaldor" then enableTrigger("BW capture") cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Adding <firebrick>Mhaldor") send("bw mhaldor", false) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>City not recognized") end
tempTimer(2, [[ if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then for _,v in pairs (gc.target_list) do --Run a loop over the target list to enemy everyone send("Enemy "..v,false) end gc.ListEnemied = "Yep" end ]])

Alias.name: Throw Bombs
Alias.script:
--change container and weapon/shield within aliases as needed.
bombs = { c = {bombtype = "concussionbomb"}, w = {bombtype = "webbomb"}, d = {bombtype = "dustbomb"}, b = {bombtype = "butterflybomb"}, o = {bombtype = "orbsigil"}, }
bomb = bombs[matches[2]]
--orbsigil for dopplgangers if matches[2] == "o" then send("setalias b1 get group orbsigil from bag/wield orbsigil/throw orbsigil at doppleganger/unwield orbsigil/combine orbsigil fully/put group orbsigil in bag") send("queue addclear eqbal b1")
--bomb ground elseif matches[3] == "g" or matches[3] == "ground" then send("setalias b1 get "..bomb.bombtype.." from bag/wield "..bomb.bombtype.." right/throw bomb at ground/unwield bomb/combine "..bomb.bombtype.." fully/put group "..bomb.bombtype.." in bag/wield shield") send("queue addclear eqbal b1") --send(gc.report.." Threw "..bomb.bombtype.." at ground")
--bomb in a direction else send("setalias b1 get "..bomb.bombtype.." from bag/wield "..bomb.bombtype.." right/throw bomb "..matches[3].."/unwield bomb/combine "..bomb.bombtype.." fully/put group "..bomb.bombtype.." in bag/wield shield") send("queue addclear eqbal b1") --send(gc.report.." Threw "..bomb.bombtype.." "..matches[3]) end

Alias.name: Target order call
Alias.script:
--Alias to call out the target list --You can force call your known list on pt by adding f to overide not calling stuff
if gc.IsLeader then gc.announcer("full") elseif matches[2] == nil then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>You are <IndianRed>NOT <SlateGrey>the leader. Add <SpringGreen>'f'<SlateGrey> to force call") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>I have "..#gc.target_list.." targets: <lemon_chiffon>"..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")) end
if matches[2] == "f" then send(string.format(gc.report.." I have "..#gc.target_list.." targets: %s", table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")),false) end

Alias.name: Call current target
Alias.script:
-- if you're the leader, this will call the current target, good for if people as what the target is -- Can also force announcing the target if not the leader with f modifier similar to zcall for order getServerEncodingsList
if gc.IsLeader then gc.announcer("Single") elseif matches[2] == "f" then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<lemon_chiffon> Forcing target call") send(string.format(gc.report.." Target: %s", target),false) else cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> You are not the leader- add <SpringGreen>'f'<SlateGrey> to force call!") end

Alias.name: Group report
Alias.script:
cecho("\n<OrangeRed>---Party combat system status:") if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("<OrangeRed>(On)") elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("<IndianRed>(OFF!)")end
-- if gc.Leader == "Me" then -- send(gc.report.." Leader: Grounde") -- else -- send(gc.report.." Leader: "..gc.Leader) -- end -- send(gc.report.." Targeting: "..target) -- send(gc.report.." Enemy list: "..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")) -- send(gc.report.." Rally at "..gmcp.Room.Info.name..", in "..gmcp.Room.Info.area) -- send(gc.report.." City target: " ..gc.Settings.CityTargeting)
send("setalias groupreport "..gc.report.." Leader: "..gc.Leader.."/"..gc.report.." Target Callers: "..table.concat(gc.Callers, ", ").."/"..gc.report.." Targeting: "..target.."/"..gc.report.." Enemy list: "..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ").."/"..gc.report.." Rally at: "..gmcp.Room.Info.name..", in "..gmcp.Room.Info.area.."/"..gc.report.." City Target: "..gc.Settings.CityTargeting) send("groupreport")

Alias.name: Reset targets
Alias.script:
--Clears the list of targets gc.target_list = {}
send("unenemy all")
--Clears Leaders and Callers --gc.Leader = "" --gc.Caller = "" --gc.Caller2 = ""
--Clear targets target = "none" gc.ToTarget = "none" gc.ListEnemied = "No"
cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<yellow> Targets cleared!") disableTrigger("Room gag") enableTrigger("Stop (Room gag)") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> Reset Room gags")

Alias.name: Reset Room triggers
Alias.script: -- This alias resets the room QL gaging triggers disableTrigger("Room gag") enableTrigger("Stop (Room gag)") cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<SlateGrey> Reset Room gags")

Alias.name: Reset Callers
Alias.script: --Clears Leaders and Callers gc.Leader = "" gc.Callers = {} cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat]<yellow> Leader and target callers cleared!")

Alias.name: Preset delete
Alias.script: gc.deletepreset(matches[2])

Alias.name: Preset lists
Alias.script:
-- Alias for saving, loading (this is a force load attempt, should load fine starting up), and seeing/using a setlist
--save function with a name check if matches[2] == "save" then if matches[3] then gc.save(matches[3]) elseif matches[3] == nil then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>v <lemon_chiffon>Need a name to save with!") end end
--Load if matches[2] == "loadsettings" then gc.load() end
--display your presets for using if matches[2] == "list" then gc.displaypresets() end
--Using a preset if matches[2] == "set" then if matches[3] then gc.setpreset(matches[3]) elseif matches[3] == nil then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <lemon_chiffon>Need a name to set a preset!") end end
--This uses a preset and checks who is in realms with QW. if matches[2] == "load" then if matches[3] then local name = matches[3]:lower():title() if table.contains(gc_list, name) then gc.TempTargetList = table.deepcopy(gc_list[tostring(name)]) enableTrigger("QW Target Check") send("qw") else cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <lemon_chiffon>Don't know that list!") end
elseif matches[3] == nil then cecho("\n<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <lemon_chiffon>Need a name to load preset!") end end

Alias.name: Force Load settings
Alias.script: gc.loadSettings()

Alias.name: Force settings save
Alias.script: gc.saveSettings()

ScriptGroup.name: Group Combat

Script.name: Targeting function
Script.script:
-- Keep Disabled. Needs fixing. Added to TO DO
function targeting(var) send("settarget "..var) target = var:lower():title()
--if you do not have AK. Comment this out or delete. ak.highlighttarget = ak.highlighttarget or true --Change This To False if Errors if ak.highlighttarget == true then if idtwo then killTrigger(idtwo) end idtwo = tempTrigger(target, [[selectString("]] .. target .. [[", 1) fg("red") resetFormat()]]) target = target:title() if id then killTrigger(id) end id = tempTrigger(target, [[selectString("]] .. target .. [[", 1) fg("red") resetFormat()]]) else end
if ak.stack and ak.stack == "none" then ak.classenable() end
--If you do not have Legacy. Comment this out or delete -- if Legacy.NDB.db[target] then -- local color = Legacy.Settings.NDB.Config[Legacy.NDB.db[target].city:lower()].color -- Legacy.NDB.lookup(target) -- sendAll("unally "..target, "enemy "..target) -- possibleClass = Legacy.NDB.db[target].class -- Legacy.bigEcho("Target set to: "..("<"..color..">" or "<white>")..target:title().." <DimGrey>(<gold>Level "..Legacy.NDB.db[target].level.." "..Legacy.NDB.db[target].class.."<DimGrey>)", "purple", "white") -- tempTimer(4, [[if Legacy.NDB.db[target].class ~= possibleClass then local color = Legacy.Settings.NDB.Config[Legacy.NDB.db[target].city:lower()].color -- Legacy.echo("Adjusted <"..color..">"..target.."'s <white>class to <gold>"..Legacy.NDB.db[target].class.."<white>.") end]]) -- end
-- This will always call your target to party -- if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then -- elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then -- send(gc.report.." Target: "..target) -- else end
echo("\n") cecho("<cyan> Target Changed to "..target) echo("\n")
end

Script.name: Target change
Script.script:
--Script handling swapping targets --Burst check gets called if the person who died is your target and you like having your target changed --Burstcheck looks at a list of recently bursted people and if your target isn't on it, looks for a new target in the room
function gc.Burstcheck(name) if not table.contains(gc.bursted, name) then gc.RoomTarget() end end

Script.name: Target list ordering
Script.script:
--Display target list for reordering, this makes clickable dialog to shift target order around or remove people function gc.order_report()
cecho("\n<OrangeRed>---Reorder target list--- ("..#gc.target_list..")\n")
--For loop to iterate over enemy list to display the clickable links to reorder. Each link calls a below function for n,v in pairs (gc.target_list) do
cechoLink("<blue>^^", [[gc.Shift_top("]]..v..[[")]], "Send "..v.." to first", true) echo(" ") cechoLink("<medium_aquamarine>Up", [[gc.Shift_up("]]..v..[[")]], "Send "..v.." up one", true) echo(" ") cechoLink("<medium_aquamarine>Down", [[gc.Shift_down("]]..v..[[")]], "Send "..v.." down one", true) echo(" ") cechoLink("<blue>vv", [[gc.Shift_bottom("]]..v..[[")]], "Send "..v.." to last", true) echo(" ") if ori.ndb then if ori.ndb.db[v].city == "underworld" then cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v.. " <grey>(Undead)",[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]] ,"", true) elseif ori.ndb.db[v] then cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v.. " <grey>("..ori.ndb.getClass(v).. ")",[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]] ,"", true) else cecho("<IndianRed>" ..v) cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v,[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]],"", true) end elseif Legacy.NDB then if Legacy.NDB.db[v] then --added this check to display with or without class, if Legacy NDB doesn't know them then it will still display --If Legacy NDB is present then the class of each person is added cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v.. " <grey>("..Legacy.NDB.db[v].class:title().. ")",[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]] ,"", true) else --cecho("<IndianRed>" ..v) cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v,[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]],"", true) end elseif ndb then if ndb.isperson(v) then --added this check to display with or without class, if NDB doesn't know them then it will still display --If NDB is present then the class of each person is added cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v.. " <grey>("..ndb.getclass(v).. ")",[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]] ,"", true)
else --cecho("<IndianRed>" ..v) cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v,[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]],"", true) end else --cecho("<red>" ..v.. "\n") cechoLink("<IndianRed>" ..v,[[appendCmdLine("zswap ]]..v..[[ ")]],"", true) end echo(" ") cechoLink("<blue>Remove\n", [[gc.Shift_remove("]]..v..[[")]], "Remove "..v.." from target list", true)
end echo("\n") end
--Shift a name up one function gc.Shift_up(name) local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, name) table.remove(gc.target_list, position) table.insert(gc.target_list,position-1,name) gc.order_report() end
--Shift a name down one function gc.Shift_down(name) local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, name) table.remove(gc.target_list, position) table.insert(gc.target_list,position+1,name) gc.order_report() end
--Move a name to top of list function gc.Shift_top(name) local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, name) table.remove(gc.target_list, position) table.insert(gc.target_list, 1,name) gc.order_report() end
--Move a name to bottom of list function gc.Shift_bottom(name) local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, name) table.remove(gc.target_list, position) table.insert(gc.target_list, name) gc.order_report() end
--Remove a name from the list function gc.Shift_remove(name) local position = table.index_of(gc.target_list, name) table.remove(gc.target_list, position) gc.autoUnenemy(name) gc.order_report() end

Script.name: Save and load presets and settings
Script.script:
-- LEAVE DISABLED. All save/load functionality has been removed or commented out for now.
--Save function to create presets function gc.save(name)
--capitalize to avoid errors --Uses the variables saveName- what you call the list- and savelist- to copy over gc.target_list to save local saveName = name:lower():title() local savelist = table.deepcopy(gc.target_list)
--Check if it's already a preset or if the target list is empty to not save if table.contains(gc_list, saveName) then cecho("
<OranageRed>[GroundeCombat] That list already exists!") elseif savelist == "" then cecho("
<OranageRed>[GroundeCombat] Can't save an empty list!") else --Adds the enemylist to the storage list gc_list as a key/pair and saves to Mudlet folder folder gc_list[tostring(saveName)] = savelist table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatPresets.lua", gc_list) --the save command cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Saved preset: <cyan>"..saveName) end end
--Load preset list function function gc.load() if io.exists(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatPresets.lua") then --Check there is a file to load table.load(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatPresets.lua", gc_list) --Attempts to load table into gc_list cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <light_blue>Loaded presets..") else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <light_blue> No saved preset list found. Have you saved one before?") end end
--Set targetlist to the requested preset name passed to it function gc.setpreset(name2) local name = name2:lower():title() if table.contains(gc_list, name) then if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then send("unenemy all") end gc.target_list = table.deepcopy(gc_list[tostring(name)]) --uses deepcopy to not link the tables cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Swapped to preset: <cyan>"..name) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>I don't know that list name.") end if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then --checks if it should enemy the list gc.autoEnemyList() end end
function gc.loadpreset(name2) local name = name2:lower():title() if table.contains(gc_list, name) then if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then send("unenemy all") end gc.target_list = table.deepcopy(gc_list[tostring(name)]) --uses deepcopy to not link the tables cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Swapped to preset: <cyan>"..name) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>I don't know that list name.") end if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then --checks if it should enemy the list gc.autoEnemyList() end end
--Show the stored presets with name to call them function gc.displaypresets() cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <yellow>Preset target lists: <lemon_chiffon>zLOAD <SlateGrey>(Only people around) <lemon_chiffon> zSET<SlateGrey> (Copy of list)") for k, v in pairs (gc_list) do cecho("
<grey>[<cyan>"..k.. "<grey>]- <light_blue> "..table.concat(v, ", ")) end end
--Delete a preset by setting its name (key) to nil and then saves the gc_list table to complete deletion function gc.deletepreset(name) local name = name:title() if gc_list == "" then cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <yellow>There's nothing to delete. Did you load your presets?") elseif table.contains(gc_list, name) then gc_list[tostring(name)] = nil cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <yellow>Successfully deleted preset: <cyan>"..name) table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatPresets.lua", gc_list) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <yellow>Couldn't find that preset to delete") end end
--Load past configuration settings function gc.loadSettings() if io.exists(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatSettings.lua") then --Check there is a file to load table.load(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatSettings.lua", gc.Settings) --Attempts to load table into gc.Settings cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <light_blue>Loaded Group Combat configurations..") else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <light_blue>No saved settings found. First time starting up?") end sendGMCP([[Core.Supports.Add ["Comm.Channel 1"] ]]) --This ensures GMCP text module loads target = target or "none" --This target variable establishment here is to ensure the system has this if someone isn't using target. They should be but just incase. Should overwrite or screw it up.
if gc.Settings.OverRide == true then --this checkes the setting to override after loading and switches the default false to true gc.IsLeader = true end
end
--Saves current GC settings for next session- attempts to reduce need to constantly set everything again function gc.saveSettings() table.save(getMudletHomeDir().."/GroupCombatSettings.lua", gc.Settings) cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <light_blue>Settings saved for next time!") end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysExitEvent", "gc.saveSettings") --Should save on closing registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysLoadEvent", "gc.loadSettings") --Load settings with startup registerAnonymousEventHandler("sysLoadEvent", "gc.load") --Load presets on startup

Script.name: Group Combat functions
Script.script:
--Handle single auto enemy function gc.autoEnemy(name) local name = name if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then send("Enemy "..name,false) enableTrigger("GC Full enemy list") tempTimer(2, [[disableTrigger("GC Full enemy list")]]) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Make sure to enemy " ..name) gc.ListEnemied = "No" end end
--Handle single unenemy function gc.autoUnenemy(name) local name = name if gc.Settings.SetEnemy == "Yep" then send("Unenemy "..name,false) else cecho("
<OrangeRed>[GroundeCombat] <SlateGrey>Make sure to unenemy " ..name) end end
--List enemy- this function enemies those on the target list, starts a trigger to detect maxing out enemy list as well function gc.autoEnemyList() for _,v in pairs (gc.target_list) do send("Enemy "..v,false) enableTrigger("Full enemy list") gc.ListEnemied = "Yep" tempTimer(4, [[disableTrigger("Full enemy list")]]) end end
--Used to call out the target change or call out the target list function gc.announcer(type) if gc.IsLeader then if type == "Single" then send(string.format(gc.report.." Target: %s", target),false)--Change these if your city/group uses a different syntax elseif type == "full" then send(string.format(gc.report.." I have "..#gc.target_list.." targets: %s", table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")),false) end end end
function gc.TargetLeftCheck() if not table.contains(gc.InRoom, target) then table.remove(gc.InRoom, table.index_of(gc.InRoom, target)) boxAlert("Target Not Here!", "black", "OrangeRed:OrangeRed", 10, 3) end enableTrigger("Exits gag") tempTimer(0.5, [[disableTrigger("Exits gag")]]) send("exits") end
function gc.combatstatus() cecho("
<OrangeRed>---Party combat system status:") if isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 1 then cecho("<OrangeRed>(On)
") elseif isActive("Group Combat", "trigger") == 0 then cecho("<IndianRed>(OFF!)
") end
cecho("
<white>zHELPS for ALL commands and zSTAT2 for non clickable version
")
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Group leader: <cyan>"..gc.Leader)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Target callers: <cyan>"..table.concat(gc.Callers, ", "))
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Targeting: <dodger_blue>" ..target) cechoLink("
<SlateGrey> Target First", [[expandAlias("zf")]], "Click to target first person in target order", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemy list: <light_blue>" ..table.concat(gc.target_list, ", ")) cechoLink("
<SlateGrey> REORDER", [[gc.order_report()]], "Click to reorder targets", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Enemied list: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>"..tostring(gc.ListEnemied):title().."", [[gc.autoEnemyList()]], "If No, click to enemy target list. 'zenemy' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Call target: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.IsLeader):title().."", [[expandAlias("zloud")]], "Toggle target calling on or off. 'zloud' alias (if not leading).", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Party target: ") cechoLink("<SlateGrey>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.TargetSwitch):title().."", [[expandAlias("zp")]], "Toggle auto or manual switching to party/leader targets. 'zp' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Re-Targeting: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.SetTarget):title().."", [[expandAlias("za")]], "Toggle auto and manual targeting. 'za' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Report to: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" .. tostring(gc.report):upper().."", [[expandAlias("zchannel party")]], "Set channel to report to. Default is pt/party. 'zchannel <channel>' alias.",true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Moved report: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.MoveReporting):title().."", [[expandAlias("zmove")]], "Toggle reporting target movement. 'zmove' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Aff reporting: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.AffCalling):title().."", [[expandAlias("zaffs")]], "Toggle affliction reporting. 'zaffs' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>Wall reporting: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.WallCalling):title().."", [[expandAlias("zwalls")]], "Toggle reporting walls. 'zwalls' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>City target: ") cechoLink("<MistyRose>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.CityTargeting):title().."", [[expandAlias("zbw "..gc.Settings.CityTargeting)]], "Click to add everyone in city to target list. 'zbw <city>' alias.", true)
cecho("
<light_blue>-<yellow>PT Chat Gag: ") cechoLink("<SlateGrey>" ..tostring(gc.Settings.PartyGag):title().."", [[expandAlias("zgag")]], "Toggle party chat gagging on/off. ONLY DO IF YOU PUSH CHAT TO WINDOW. 'zgag' alias.",true)
end

Script.name: PlayersInRoom
Script.script:
function PlayersInRoom() gc.InRoom = {}
local me = gmcp.Char.Status.name:title() --establish your name to not add yourself for _, player in ipairs(gmcp.Room.Players) do if player.name ~= me or player.name ~= gmcp.Char.Status.name then if player.fullname ~= "The soul of "..player.name then gc.InRoom[player.name] = true else gc.InRoom[player.name] = nil end end end end
-- Below was commented out because it was not reliably capturing GMCP events.
-- function gc.RoomPeople(event) -- if event == "gmcp.Room.Players" then -- -- --Reset people in room, then parse the gmcp list to add people who aren't you. -- gc.InRoom = {} -- local me = gmcp.Char.Status.name:title() --establish your name to not add yourself -- for _, tab in pairs(gmcp.Room.Players) do --This for loop puts all the names in the table gc.InRoom -- if tab.name ~= me or tab.fullname ~= "The soul of "..tab.name then --Ensure self and souls are not added -- table.insert(gc.InRoom, tab.name) -- end -- end -- -- elseif event == "gmcp.Room.AddPlayer" then --If someone entered the room, just add them -- -- --Grab the player from gmcp. -- local person = gmcp.Room.AddPlayer -- --If the person isn't already in the list and not a soul, then add them. -- if not table.contains(gc.InRoom, person.name) and person.fullname ~= "The soul of "..person.name then -- table.insert(gc.InRoom, person.name) -- end -- -- remove people from room if they leave. -- elseif event == "gmcp.Room.RemovePlayer" then -- local person = gmcp.Room.RemovePlayer -- table.remove(gc.InRoom, table.index_of(gc.InRoom, person)) -- end -- end -- -- registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.Players", "gc.RoomPeople") --This makes the above function run when Room.Player data comes in -- registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.RemovePlayer", "gc.RoomPeople") --This runs above function when someone leaves -- registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Room.AddPlayer", "gc.RoomPeople") --This runa above function when someone enters (not perfect)-Doesn't capture followers? --

Script.name: AddPlayersinRoom
Script.script: function AddPlayersinRoom() if gmcp.Room.AddPlayer.name ~= gmcp.Char.Status.name then if gmcp.Room.AddPlayer.fullname ~= "The soul of "..gmcp.Room.AddPlayer.name then gc.InRoom[gmcp.Room.AddPlayer.name] = true else gc.InRoom[gmcp.Room.AddPlayer.name] = nil end end end

Script.name: RemovePlayersinRoom
Script.script: function RemovePlayersinRoom() if gmcp.Room.RemovePlayer ~= gmcp.Char.Status.name then gc.InRoom[gmcp.Room.RemovePlayer] = nil end end

Script.name: Room targeting
Script.script: --This function attempts to compare who is in the room with who is on the target list in order of target list --It should also cross checks and skips people on SoulList (recent dead) function gc.RoomTarget() for n, v in pairs (gc.target_list) do if table.contains(gc.InRoom, v) and not table.contains(gc.SoulList, v) then target = v boxAlert("Found Target - "..target, "red", "purple", 40, 5) expandAlias("t "..target) raiseEvent("GC Target Changed") gc.announcer("Single") break elseif n == #gc.target_list then boxAlert("No enemies in room. Set your own target", "SpringGreen", "orange", 1, 1) break end end end

Script.name: Room gag
Script.script:
--This function is used to find the line for where a room description starts --Good for either gagging a room description or setting up a gated trigger to read through a room description to pick things up (eg. If people are souls, directions of things)
function RoomTitle() local RoomName = gmcp.Room.Info.name local Line = getCurrentLine() Line = string.gsub(Line, "%." , "")
if tostring(Line) == tostring(RoomName) then return true
else return false end end

Script.name: Box Alerts
Script.script:
--[[
Resizeable boxes that accept strings and colors str : [required] accepts string for message strColor : [required] accepts string for message color boxColor : [required] accepts string for box color "foreground" or "foreground:background" (same fg/bg will create a colored box without stylized border) boxWidth : [optional] accepts integer for box width, unit: characters boxHeight: [optional] accepts integer for box height, unit: lines strLength: [optional] accepts integer for message length (only use if adding additional color tags to message, example: boxAlert("T<red>E<green>S<red>T", "green", "ansiBlue:ansiBlue", nil, nil, 4) )
--]]
function boxAlert(str, strColor, boxColor, boxWidth, boxHeight, strLength)
boxWidth = boxWidth or 54 --value for default box width boxHeight = boxHeight or 5 --value for default box height strLength = strLength or string.len(str)
if boxWidth < (strLength+2) then boxWidth = (strLength+2) end
outside = "\n<"..boxColor..">+" for i=1, (boxWidth-2) do outside = outside.."-" end outside = outside.."+" inside = "\n<"..boxColor..">|" for i=1, (boxWidth-2) do inside = inside.." " end inside = inside.."|"
padding = math.floor((boxWidth-strLength-2)/2) middle = "\n<"..boxColor..">|" for i=1,padding do middle = middle.." " end middle = middle.."<"..strColor..">"..str.."<"..boxColor..">" for i=1,padding do middle = middle.." " end if (boxWidth+strLength)%2 == 0 then middle = middle.."|" else middle = middle.." |" end
cecho(outside) for i=1,math.floor((boxHeight-3)/2) do cecho(inside) end cecho(middle) for i=1,math.floor((boxHeight-3)/2) do cecho(inside) end if boxHeight > 2 and boxHeight%2 == 0 then cecho(inside) end cecho(outside) end

ScriptGroup.name: Useful code snippets
ScriptGroup.script:
--[[ -- I recomment adding this to your targeting alias with the following if statement
if ndb.getcity(target) ~= "Hashan" then gc.TargetAdd(target) end
--Can make it this if you don't want it to add while hunting since their's no lead set if gc.Leader ~= "" or gc.Leader ~= "none" then gc.TargetAdd(target) end
-- Note: This must be after you set target variable or you won't pass an updated target.. or then it should be this gc.TargetAdd(matches[2])
You can also make both checks happen like this
if gc.Leader ~= "" or gc.Leader ~= "none" then if ndb.getcity(target) ~= "Cyrene" then gc.TargetAdd(target) end end
--or here it is with some toggle you have on an alias --For example, in your target alias
if add_target then gc.TargetAdd(target) end
--Separate alias pattern- I hate coming up with these so pick something easy
Code--> add_target = add_target or false if add_target == false then add_target = true cecho("\n<lemon_chiffon>-Adding targets to order!") else add_target = false cecho("\n<IndianRed>-Not adding targets to order!") end
--Also, add this to your target alias, this is for announcing a target change on pt when you perform it with your target alias and it will only announce when you are either the group leader or calling target changes anyways
gc.announcer("Single")
--]]

Script.name: Useful for you
Script.script:
--This function takes a name you pass it to check if a person is on your target list to act on. Returns true if they are or false -- Use it like this usually in a reflex... gc.IsTarget(matches[2]) ... if you want to reflexively do something to a person on your list function gc.IsTarget(name) if table.contains(gc.target_list, name) then return true else return false end end
--This funciton takes a name you give it and adds it to your target list. Good to add this to your general target alias to easily grab names --See useful code snippets for how to work this in to your alias without adding random stuff to your target list function gc.TargetAdd(name) if not table.contains(gc.target_list, name) then table.insert(gc.target_list, name) end end
